svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux aarch64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="F5r7zJM-yu1Nid3TsCx4" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-589" dy="-175" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="RAG — Core Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="680" x="160" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.basic.person;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;" value="User" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="60" x="30" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="query" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="Query" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="150" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_user_query" edge="1" parent="1" source="user" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;" target="query"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="embed_query" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Embedding Model
(Query Encoder)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="340" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_q_emb" edge="1" parent="1" source="query" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;" target="embed_query"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vector_store" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;direction=south;" value="Vector Store
(Embeddings Index)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="140" x="580" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_emb_vs" edge="1" parent="1" source="embed_query" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;" target="vector_store"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kb_container" parent="1" style="swimlane;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;startSize=30;" value="Knowledge Base" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="580" x="520" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="doc1" parent="kb_container" style="shape=document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Documents
/ PDFs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="100" x="20" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="doc2" parent="kb_container" style="shape=document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Web Pages
/ HTML" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="100" x="140" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="doc3" parent="kb_container" style="shape=document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Databases
/ APIs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="100" x="260" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="doc4" parent="kb_container" style="shape=document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Code / Logs
/ CSVs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="100" x="380" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="doc5" parent="kb_container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Embedding
Model" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="80" x="480" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_kb_vs" edge="1" parent="1" source="kb_container" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;dashed=1;strokeColor=#666666;" target="vector_store"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="retriever" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Retriever
(ANN Search / Hybrid)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="800" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_vs_ret" edge="1" parent="1" source="vector_store" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;" target="retriever"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reranker" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;" value="Re-ranker
(Cross-encoder)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="800" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ret_rr" edge="1" parent="1" source="retriever" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;" target="reranker"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="context" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Context Builder
(Prompt Assembly)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="580" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_rr_ctx" edge="1" parent="1" source="reranker" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;" target="context"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_q_ctx" edge="1" parent="1" source="query" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;dashed=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" target="context"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="llm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="LLM Generator
(GPT-4, Claude, Llama...)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="340" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ctx_llm" edge="1" parent="1" source="context" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;" target="llm"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="response" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Grounded
Response" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="150" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_llm_resp" edge="1" parent="1" source="llm" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;" target="response"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_resp_user" edge="1" parent="1" source="response" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;" target="user"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lbl_ingest" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontStyle=2;fontSize=11;fontColor=#666666;" value="Offline Ingestion Pipeline" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="200" x="540" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lbl_online" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontStyle=2;fontSize=11;fontColor=#666666;" value="Online Query Pipeline" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="650" x="340" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
